title: Construction Project Manager
description:
Work Hours: 9am-6pm, 5.5days(Depends on requirement) 

JOB SCOPE  

 1. Project Planning & Control 

  • Prepare, implement, and manage the overall project master plan and construction execution plan 

  • Develop and enforce project quality and safety management plans in compliance with company and regulatory requirements 

  • Control key project milestones, proactively manage risks, and ensure on-time project delivery 

2. Project Execution & Site Management 

  • Organize and manage project execution activities, including material approval/sampling and implementation of VPMU or the company’s project management system 

  • Coordinate on-site construction activities and ensure smooth interfacing between different trades and work sequences 

  • Resolve critical issues and handle unexpected situations during project execution 

3. Design Coordination & Technical Implementation 

  • Coordinate with design teams to ensure effective implementation of design solutions on site 

  • Propose constructability-driven improvements and value engineering solutions based on site conditions 

  • Participate in external coordination related to key technical solutions and major project milestones 

4. External Coordination & Stakeholder Management 

  • Act as the primary point of contact with the main contractor, client, consultants, and other project stakeholders 

  • Manage interfaces among all parties and maintain effective working relationships 

  • Ensure clear and timely communication to support smooth project progress 

5. Cost & Contract Management 

  • Control project costs in accordance with approved budgets and company guidelines 

  • Participate in contract administration, including variations, claims, site instructions, and final accounts 

  • Support project cost analysis and risk control throughout the project lifecycle 

6. Team & Subcontractor Management 

  • Organize and manage the project team, including role allocation and daily management 

  • Provide professional input and recommendations on subcontractor selection and strategy 

  • Manage subcontractor performance to ensure compliance with schedule, quality, and contractual requirements 

SKILL REQUIREMENTS 

  • Minimum 8 years of experience in the construction industry in façade or curtain wall.

  • At least 5 years of relevant experience in project management or related disciplines 

  • Proven experience in managing full project life cycles; experience in medium to large-scale projects is preferred 

  • Strong knowledge of site management, project scheduling, cost control, and contract administration 

If you are keen to know more about this role, please email Syasya at nurilyana.syasya@rmagroup.com.sg and send your resume in MS Word format. Note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Nurilyana Syasya (EA Regn No: R25157984)

RMA Consultants Pte Ltd (EA Licence No: 93C4403)

postedCompany.description:
RMA Consultants is a highly experienced Human Resource Outsourcing (HRO) service provider that excels in delivering strategic HR solutions and advisory to help strengthen human capital for business success.


Firmly grounded in comprehending significant social trends and key industry knowledge, RMA is focus-driven in providing practical HR solutions in today’s competitive marketplace in sourcing for Cross-functional Executive Search, Staffing, Recruitment and other customized HR Consultancy services.
